$comment: Claude Code QUARANTINE profile for untrusted-code triage. Enforcement layer 1+2. Point Claude Code at this via --settings, or copy into the throwaway workspace's .claude/settings.json. The guard hook path is a PLACEHOLDER — the launcher rewrites it to an absolute path, or edit it yourself. This is NOT a substitute for the OS sandbox (layer 0): run inside a network-isolated, read-only-mounted container/VM for a true boundary.
